# Vendored OpenJiuwen Maven Artifact

This directory temporarily vendors `com.openjiuwen:agent-core-java:0.1.12` so
GitHub Actions can install it into the runner-local Maven repository before the
normal project build.

Remove this directory and the matching CI install step once the artifact is
available from an authenticated or public Maven repository.
